content:
## MARKET OVERVIEW

1. What is the Current Market Regime?
NEUTRAL regime — normal volatility and mixed breadth. Vol: 26.0%. Breadth: 3/8 sectors positive.

2. Which sectors are leading?
Construction & REIT leading: TKFEN (1W: +22.97% | 1M: +26.97%) ABOVE TREND. Transportation showing selective strength: TAVHL (1W: +2.36% | 1M: -9.37%) RECOVERY and THYAO (1W: +1.55% | 1M: -4.23%) RECOVERY.

3. Which sectors are lagging?
Banking & Finance is the weakest: AKBNK (1W: -6.19% | 1M: -24.13%) BELOW TREND and GARAN (1W: -6.37% | 1M: -21.04%) BELOW TREND. Energy & Chemicals soft: TRMET (1W: -16.57% | 1M: -27.09%) BELOW TREND; Retail also under pressure: SOKM (1W: -8.40% | 1M: -30.17%) BELOW TREND.

## STOCK PERFORMANCE

4. Top Performing Stocks?
TKFEN (1W: +22.97% | 1M: +26.97%) ABOVE TREND, MGROS (1W: +3.25% | 1M: -9.73%) RECOVERY, KCHOL (1W: +2.73% | 1M: -2.35%) RECOVERY, TAVHL (1W: +2.36% | 1M: -9.37%) RECOVERY, THYAO (1W: +1.55% | 1M: -4.23%) RECOVERY.

5. Worst Performing Stocks?
TRMET (1W: -16.57% | 1M: -27.09%) BELOW TREND, TRALT (1W: -12.34% | 1M: -31.58%) BELOW TREND, SOKM (1W: -8.40% | 1M: -30.17%) BELOW TREND, KONTR (1W: -6.49% | 1M: -10.19%) BELOW TREND, GARAN (1W: -6.37% | 1M: -21.04%) BELOW TREND.

6. Momentum Stocks?
Upside momentum: TKFEN (1W: +22.97% | 1M: +26.97%) ABOVE TREND, MGROS (1W: +3.25% | 1M: -9.73%) RECOVERY, KCHOL (1W: +2.73% | 1M: -2.35%) RECOVERY. Downside momentum: TRMET (1W: -16.57% | 1M: -27.09%) BELOW TREND, TRALT (1W: -12.34% | 1M: -31.58%) BELOW TREND, SOKM (1W: -8.40% | 1M: -30.17%) BELOW TREND.

## SECTOR OUTLOOK

7. Banking Sector Outlook?
Banking under heavy pressure; focus on downside risk and required de-risking. AKBNK (1W: -6.19% | 1M: -24.13%) BELOW TREND, GARAN (1W: -6.37% | 1M: -21.04%) BELOW TREND, ISCTR (1W: -5.52% | 1M: -22.24%) BELOW TREND, YKBNK (1W: -4.60% | 1M: -23.19%) BELOW TREND.

8. Industrial Sector Outlook?
Mixed: Construction & REIT outperforming while Heavy Industry shows dispersion. EREGL (1W: +0.00% | 1M: -11.09%) NEUTRAL, KRDMD (1W: +0.00% | 1M: -5.95%) NEUTRAL, ARCLK (1W: -5.56% | 1M: -6.99%) BELOW TREND, ASELS (1W: -2.36% | 1M: +8.00%) CORRECTION.

9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?
Energy remains weak with selective rebounds in large caps. TUPRS (1W: -5.03% | 1M: +15.00%) CORRECTION, TRMET (1W: -16.57% | 1M: -27.09%) BELOW TREND, TRALT (1W: -12.34% | 1M: -31.58%) BELOW TREND, SISE (1W: +1.40% | 1M: -1.88%) RECOVERY.

## PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

10. Portfolio Recommendation?
Neutral and selective: trim exposure to banks and weak energy names, overweight Construction & REIT and selective Transportation/holding longs; keep cash for volatility-triggered entries. Focus position sizing and tighten stops on high-drawdown names.

## NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?
TKFEN (1W: +22.97% | 1M: +26.97%) ABOVE TREND for momentum continuation, AKBNK (1W: -6.19% | 1M: -24.13%) BELOW TREND for downside follow-through, TUPRS (1W: -5.03% | 1M: +15.00%) CORRECTION on commodity/FX sensitivity, TRMET (1W: -16.57% | 1M: -27.09%) BELOW TREND as a risk monitor.

12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?
Banking for contagion risk and headline sensitivity, Energy & Chemicals for commodity and FX-driven moves, Construction & REIT for momentum and relative strength.

13. Key Levels & Triggers?
Watch XU100 behavior around the recent weekly swing low and prior resistance for direction; key catalysts are CBRT communications, USD/TRY moves, Q1 earnings and foreign flows. Breaks below weekly lows would signal further risk; reclaiming early-March highs would validate risk-on rotation.

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
Neutral regime with normal volatility and mixed breadth; Construction & REIT and selective Transportation are the tactical focus while Banking and parts of Energy remain the largest risk areas. Be selective, size carefully, and watch CBRT, FX and Q1 corporate news as the primary triggers.
